/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CTORD: DEFENDANT IS PERMITTED TO TRAVEL OUTSIDE THE STATE OF  CALIFORNIA ON THE FOLLOWING DATES:/X: FROM 09-01-22 THROUGH09-05-22 TO STATE OF NY ANDFROM 09-27-22 THROUGH 10-02-22 TO STATE OF PENNSYLVANIA,/CONT/DAWF/

/X (AMENDED MINUTES FOR COURT DATE 03-17-22)/CAL DA MOTION TO AMEND THE CMPLAINT/X:COURT GRANTS THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT,/X:FIRST AMENDED FELONY COMPLAINT IS FILED IN COURT,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NGPLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON05-26-22 IN DEPT, 12/DOPU:NO DISPO,/X:THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO TRAVEL OUTSIDE THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA IS APPROVED BY THE COURT AS FOLLOWS: HOUSTONTEXAS FROM 04-14-22 THROUGH 04-17-22;  CHICAGO FROM 04-28-22 THROUGH 05-02-22; LV NEVADA FROM 05-20-22 THROUGH 05-24-22;  JUNEAU ALASKA FROM 07-02-22THROUGH 07-09-22,/

/CAL:DA MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT AND TO SET/DAWT/X:PROTECTIVE ORDER DISCOVERY OF CHILD SEXUAL ABUSE MATERIAL IS FILED IN COURT BY THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY,/CONTD:STATUS OF NEW COUNSEL AND DA MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT/DOPC/X:THE DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR VIA ZOOM,/

/CAL: ASSIGNMENT OF ATTORNEY/NTW60/LDPX:  04-08-22(60)/VD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 02-18-22/X: WRITTEN ORDER FOR RELEASE CONDITIONS ARE AS FOLLOWS:DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH PREVIOUSLY ISSUED STAY AWAY ORDER; NO SOCIAL MEDIA; PROVIDE ALL ELECTRONIC PASSWORDS; NO CONTACT WITH MINORS OR LOITERING WHERE THEY HANG OUT/WS/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPT 20 ON 02-24-22/DAWF/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:DA IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:MOTION TO DETAIN FILED/X:EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN FILED/ORNAS/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:02-23-22 (10TH)/X:THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 04-08-22/X:DEFENDANT IS ORALLY ADMONISHED NOT TO HAVE ANY CONTACTWITH MINORS ON LINE OR IN PERSON OR CONGREGATE WHERE CHILDREN ARE PRESENTSUCH AS  SCHOOLS OR PARKS; NOT ACCESS ANY ONLINE OR APP BASED SOCIAL MEDIASITES;/ /WS/X:WARRANTLESS SEARCH CONDITIONS APPLY TO THE DEFENDANT'S PERSONAL COMPUTER, CELL PHONE, OR ANY DEVICE IN THE DEEFENDANT'S POSSESSION THATCAN ACCESS THE INTERNET;/X:DEFENDANT IS TO SUPPLY PASSWORDS TO ALL OF HIS DEVICES THAT CAN ACCESS THE INTERNET TO ANY PEACE, PAROLE OR PROBATION OFFICER/X:NO WRITTEN ORDER WAS FILED/CTORD:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY TO PREPARE A WRITTEN ORDER/CONTD: 02-18-22 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD: 02-09-22 FORASSIGNMENT OF ATTORNEY/DOP/
